title: German Pan-Seared Haddock
description: A traditional German dish featuring pan-seared haddock with a crispy exterior and a tender interior, served with a side of sautéed bitter greens. This meal is a hearty and flavorful way to enjoy the fresh taste of the sea.
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the haddock with paprika and salt.
Add a tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet and sear the haddock for 3-4 minutes per side.
While the haddock is cooking, sauté the bitter greens in a separate skillet with a tablespoon of olive oil.
Once the haddock is cooked, remove it from the skillet and set it aside.
Add the sautéed bitter greens to the skillet with the haddock's drippings and stir to combine.
Serve the haddock with the sautéed bitter greens and a squeeze of fresh juice.
